category_sources: Official GitHub README usage shows gistit creating public and private GitHub Gists from command input or files.
source_facts.description says it is a command-line utility for creating Gists.
display_name_sources: Official repository name and README usage use gistit.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains a Usage section for creating public/private gists, filenames, file uploads, descriptions, help, and version.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/tummychow/git-absorb; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README usage describes staged changes, git absorb, and rebase --autosquash.
Official repository is the source of the git-absorb command.
